title: alocasia × mortfontanensis
intro: Alocasia × mortfontanensis, also known as the Elephant Ear or Mortfontaine Elephant Ear, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Alocasia genus. Traditionally, the plant's rhizome and roots are used for their medicinal properties, which are believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits associated with Alocasia × mortfontanensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
